title: Recurring Tasks is now fully compatible with the monday.com mobile app!
excerpt: Exciting news! :tada: The Recurring Tasks app is now fully compatible with the monday.com mobile app, meaning you can schedule, edit, and manage all your repeating tasks right from your phone. We’re proud to be one of th…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting news! The Recurring Tasks app is now fully compatible with the monday.com mobile app, meaning you can schedule, edit, and manage all your repeating tasks right from your phone. We’re proud to be one of the first marketplace apps with true mobile compatibility, and the only recurring tasks solution you can use on mobile today.

With Recurring Tasks, you can:

  • Automatically create and schedule daily, weekly, or custom recurring items and subitems

  • Edit each recurrence on the go, right from your device

  • Set custom start/end dates and working days for flexibility

  • Keep your boards, calendars, and reports up to date without manual effort

Take control of your workflow wherever you are, with the only recurring tasks app designed for monday.com mobile!

Screenshot 2025-10-07 at 11.55.271350×798 92.2 KB

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
arubinomunoz:

We’re proud to be one of the first marketplace apps with true mobile compatibility, and the only recurring tasks solution you can use on mobile today.

With Recurring Tasks, you can:

Take control of your workflow wherever you are, with the only recurring tasks app designed for monday.com mobile!

That’s fantastic news! It’s great to see the Recurring Tasks app expanding its functionality to mobile users. Here’s a question to consider:

Great for those of us who rely on mobile devices to manage our workflows on the go. The ability to schedule and edit recurring tasks directly from the monday.com mobile app will undoubtedly streamline our processes and boost productivity. Thanks!
